response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and DLang developer, but fundamentally lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development on Windows. Their professional C++ experience is limited to a brief 6-month stint in 2014-2015, and their financial domain exposure is restricted to a Node/TypeScript role rather than the required Fixed Income or Capital Markets C++ expertise.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software engineering experience (10+ years) with a strong focus on CI/CD, TDD, and agile practices.
Exposure to the financial/investment sector through previous work at RIDE Capital.
Possesses several optional skills including scripting languages, CI/CD pipeline knowledge, and Java development background.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience, listing only 6 months of professional C/C++ work from a decade ago.
No demonstrated experience with Windows-based C++ development (the only C++ project detailed explicitly used Linux).
Lacks the required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Derivatives, or heavy Investment Banking/Capital Markets systems.
